metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for workflow optimization — efficiency auditing, hook diagnosis & repair, zero-overhead quick notes.

plugins.name: hook-doctor
plugins.description: Inspects and repairs Claude Code hook configurations. Detects 7 common misconfigurations and applies safe, idempotent fixes.

plugins.name: efficiency-audit
plugins.description: Analyzes Claude Code conversation transcripts to surface recurring inefficiencies and generate fix recommendations via heuristic rule engine.

plugins.name: quicknotes
plugins.description: Fast, zero-subprocess quick-note capture and management. Notes are centralized markdown files with JSON frontmatter, searchable via grep. The agent uses built-in tools directly — no Python overhead.
